title: Rename master branch to main branch

comments.body:
To all, you will need to make these changes to your environments.

```
git branch -m master main
git fetch origin
git branch -u origin/main main
git remote set-head origin -a
```

/cc @lsm5 @mwhahaha @baude
no worries on the packaging side.
SGTM, already ran your script, do you want me to reset the repo, or can you do this?
I made the change and created PR #93 to update documentation.
